_comment: Dual Coq+Lean cross-validation registry (see ../docs/frama-c-dual-tp-spec.md). One entry per trust-bearing lemma. 'status' is honest per side; a lemma is dual-TP CERTIFIED only when coq+lean are verified AND crosscheck_3way is 'pass'. The 3-way structural cross-check tooling (dualtp/) is not yet built — see DUALTP-STATUS.md.

lemmas.statement_informal: included p a q b -> separated q b r c -> separated p a r c

status.coq: verified: Closed under the global context (coqwp/check.sh)
